meta_title: For Freelancers: user onboarding to Solve no marketing skills (Beginner Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to user onboarding and overcome no marketing skills. A Beginner-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: User Onboarding to Solve No Marketing Skills
content.seo_description: Stop struggling with marketing. Learn how to leverage automated user onboarding to retain clients and scale your apps using Antigravity and Claude Code.
content.answer_block: You don't need a marketing degree to grow your SaaS; you need an automated onboarding flow. By transforming your app's first-run experience into a value-delivery engine, you convert users into advocates instantly. This tutorial shows you how to automate this process using Antigravity and Claude Code, turning product into your best salesperson.
content.intro:
The cold reality of freelancing is that code alone doesn't pay the bills—retention does. You’ve built a functional app, but your users drop off within minutes because they don't see the value. You aren't a marketing expert, and you shouldn't have to be. The secret to scaling isn't expensive ad spend; it's a frictionless, automated onboarding sequence that turns every new sign-up into a power user.

We are going to bridge the gap between 'shipping code' and 'shipping value.' By integrating intelligent onboarding triggers, you stop selling features and start selling outcomes. Let's build a system that works while you sleep, ensuring your clients see immediate ROI from your work.

steps.title: Define the 'Aha!' Moment
steps.description: Identify the exact action that triggers value for your user. Without this, your onboarding is just noise.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze my current codebase and identify the core function that provides immediate value. Propose a 3-step 'Aha!' flow that guides a new user to this function.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Identify the core value proposition in the current project files and outline an onboarding sequence.'

steps.title: Implement Intelligent Triggers
steps.description: Use Antigravity to inject state-aware logic that detects when a user is stuck or inactive.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a middleware component that monitors user activity and triggers a contextual tooltip when the user has been idle on the dashboard for 30 seconds.
steps.claude_code_command: claude add 'Implement a state-aware onboarding trigger based on user inactivity'

steps.title: Automate Value-Driven Emails
steps.description: Connect your onboarding flow to an email service to keep users engaged outside the app.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a template for a 'Day 1' onboarding email that provides a link directly to the user's unfinished task within our app.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Integrate an email service provider for automated onboarding triggers'

steps.title: Build Contextual Tooltips
steps.description: Don't overwhelm the user. Show them exactly what they need, exactly when they need it.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Design a lightweight, CSS-only tooltip component that highlights the primary action button after the user completes the registration flow.
steps.claude_code_command: claude add 'Create a contextual tooltip component for the main dashboard action'

steps.title: Analyze and Iterate
steps.description: Use logs to see where users drop off and refine the flow using Claude Code.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Review my logs and suggest three specific friction points in the onboarding flow that need optimization based on user drop-off rates.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Analyze logs for onboarding drop-offs and suggest UI improvements'

pro_tips: Never use a 'Welcome' modal; use an 'Action' modal that forces a micro-commitment.
Measure onboarding success by 'Time to First Value' (TTFV), not just sign-up completion.
Use progressive disclosure: hide advanced features behind a 'Pro' toggle to avoid overwhelming beginners.
Personalize the UI by greeting users by name in the onboarding flow; it increases engagement by 20%.
Treat your onboarding flow as a living product feature that requires A/B testing every time you add new functionality.
content.next_steps: Deploy your changes to a staging environment, run a small group of beta users through the flow, and monitor the conversion metrics using your new analytics dashboard.
content.conversion_block: Stop building features that nobody uses and start building systems that drive retention. By automating your onboarding, you elevate your status from a coder to a growth partner for your clients. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
